title: Statistics - Reserve Bank of New Zealand - Te Pūtea Matua
content:
It looks like the browser you're using doesn’t work well with our website. For a better experience, please update to the latest version of Chrome , Edge , Firefox or Safari .
We publish daily statistics and insights that relate to our policy and regulatory responsibilities.

## What's being published today
Macroeconomic measurements used to understand the current and future activity of the New Zealand economy.

### Exchange and interest rates
Current and historical time series information on exchange and interest rates.
Statistics on New Zealand households’ finances, expectations on a range of economic indicators and interactions with the financial system.

### Insurance financial statistics
Financial statistics about regulated insurers operating in New Zealand.

### International position
Statistics about New Zealand’s overseas reserves, foreign currency liquidity and position with the International Monetary Fund.

### Lending and monetary statistics
Financial statistics on sector lending, credit cards, mortgages, lending flows and more.

### Non-bank and other financial institutions
Financial statistics about non-bank and other financial institutions operating in New Zealand.

### New Zealand debt securities
Statistics about holdings of central government debt securities on issue in New Zealand and more.
Financial statistics about regulated registered banks operating in New Zealand.
Financial statistics about our balance sheet, bank notes, coin mintings and more.
We set the OCR to influence interest rates. We use our influence to keep inflation low and stable.
Updated:
                            
                                2:00pm,  27 May 2026
Next update:
                            
                                2:00pm,  08 Jul 2026
Consumers Price Index (CPI) inflation occurs when the prices of a range of goods and services rise on average.

## Real Trade Weighted Index (TWI)

## Retail interest rates on deposits and mortgage lending
Data is released from 3pm daily. We cannot guarantee an exact publication time for tables and related documents to appear on the website. Data is not released on New Zealand national public holidays.
The key statistics summarise macroeconomic and financial market trends in New Zealand.

### Stats alerts and updates
From time to time the Reserve Bank will make changes to the statistical tables and data we publish. We will provide an overview of any major changes and the planned work programme on this page.

### Bank Financial Strength Dashboard
Explore the financial strength of banks in New Zealand.
Statistical releases for a range of economic and financial data produced by us and other organisations are released here.

### Our data collections
The Reserve Bank of New Zealand runs a wide range of data collections as part of its mandate to promote a sound and dynamic monetary and financial system.
